Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The GetFilteredPlugins method returns the renderer plugins that remain after the current filters have been applied, sorted by display name.

Note.Paragraph: The returned RendererPlugin values share ownership of the loaded modules and remain valid as long as at least one copy exists.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: A sorted list of filtered renderer plugin records. Each value shares ownership of the loaded module.
